creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
As discussed in the thread 

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2014-November/081013.html

and described by Steven Hartland in

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2014-November/081033.html

after freebsd-update aacraid no longer provides access to raw drives, but
only passX.

Reverting a small part of r257847 seems to fix the issue.

Should this be in errata for 10.1-RELEASE ?
